parameters.name: seed

param_schema.title: Seed
param_schema.description: Random seed for reproducible results. Use the same seed value to get the same output for identical inputs. Leave blank for random results each time.

parameters.description: Random seed for reproducible results. Use the same seed value to get the same output for identical inputs. Leave blank for random results each time.

parameters.name: text

param_schema.title: Text
param_schema.description: Input text for dialogue generation. Use [S1], [S2] to indicate different speakers and (description) in parentheses for non-verbal cues e.g., (laughs), (whispers).

parameters.description: Input text for dialogue generation. Use [S1], [S2] to indicate different speakers and (description) in parentheses for non-verbal cues e.g., (laughs), (whispers).

parameters.name: top_p

param_schema.title: Top P
param_schema.description: Controls diversity of word choice. Higher values include more unusual options. Most users shouldn't need to adjust this parameter.

parameters.description: Controls diversity of word choice. Higher values include more unusual options. Most users shouldn't need to adjust this parameter.

parameters.name: cfg_scale

param_schema.title: Cfg Scale
param_schema.description: Controls how closely the audio follows your text. Higher values (3-5) follow text more strictly; lower values may sound more natural but deviate more.

parameters.description: Controls how closely the audio follows your text. Higher values (3-5) follow text more strictly; lower values may sound more natural but deviate more.

parameters.name: temperature

param_schema.title: Temperature
param_schema.description: Controls randomness in generation. Higher values (1.3-2.0) increase variety; lower values make output more consistent. Set to 0 for deterministic (greedy) generation.

parameters.description: Controls randomness in generation. Higher values (1.3-2.0) increase variety; lower values make output more consistent. Set to 0 for deterministic (greedy) generation.

parameters.name: audio_prompt

param_schema.title: Audio Prompt
param_schema.description: Optional audio file (.wav/.mp3/.flac) for voice cloning. The model will attempt to mimic this voice style.

parameters.description: Optional audio file (.wav/.mp3/.flac) for voice cloning. The model will attempt to mimic this voice style.

parameters.name: speed_factor

param_schema.title: Speed Factor
param_schema.description: Adjusts playback speed of the generated audio. Values below 1.0 slow down the audio; 1.0 is original speed.

parameters.description: Adjusts playback speed of the generated audio. Values below 1.0 slow down the audio; 1.0 is original speed.

parameters.name: max_new_tokens

param_schema.title: Max New Tokens
param_schema.description: Controls the length of generated audio. Higher values create longer audio. (86 tokens ≈ 1 second of audio).

parameters.description: Controls the length of generated audio. Higher values create longer audio. (86 tokens ≈ 1 second of audio).

parameters.name: cfg_filter_top_k

param_schema.title: Cfg Filter Top K
param_schema.description: Technical parameter for filtering audio generation tokens. Higher values allow more diverse sounds; lower values create more consistent audio.

parameters.description: Technical parameter for filtering audio generation tokens. Higher values allow more diverse sounds; lower values create more consistent audio.

parameters.name: audio_prompt_text

param_schema.title: Audio Prompt Text
param_schema.description: Optional transcript of the audio prompt. If provided, this will be prepended to the main text input.

parameters.description: Optional transcript of the audio prompt. If provided, this will be prepended to the main text input.

parameters.name: max_audio_prompt_seconds

param_schema.title: Max Audio Prompt Seconds
param_schema.description: Maximum duration in seconds for the input voice cloning audio prompt. Only used when an audio prompt is provided. Longer voice samples will be truncated to this length.

parameters.description: Maximum duration in seconds for the input voice cloning audio prompt. Only used when an audio prompt is provided. Longer voice samples will be truncated to this length.
